description_long: This is a single-story residential house with a light-colored exterior and a green, multi-pitched roof featuring triangular gable sections. The property includes a red-tiled driveway leading to a garage and a carport, both of which are occupied by vehicles. The front facade has a small arched entryway with a red door, flanked by rectangular windows, and a short walkway connecting to the driveway. The backyard is enclosed by a white wall and features a landscaped area with a palm tree and decorative ground cover. The house is surrounded by paved surfaces and minimal vegetation, giving it a clean, suburban appearance.
description: A single-story, light-colored house with a green gable roof, red-tiled driveway, garage, and enclosed backyard with a palm tree.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched entryway, red door, two front windows, and the driveway with two parked vehicles.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, carport, red side door, and the full length of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a palm tree, decorative ground cover, and a window facing the garden.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the expanse of the green roof and the enclosed backyard with minimal visible openings.
attribute_entryway_design: Arched main entry with a red door, small front step, and no porch or columns.
